# Probe Platform Documentation

The ultimate observability and analytics platform for Solana programs.

## Navigation
- Introduction: /docs
- Getting Started: /docs/getting-started
- Program Analytics: /docs/program-analytics
- Instruction Deep-Dive: /docs/instructions
- Health Scores: /docs/health
- CPI Analysis: /docs/cpi
- MEV Detection: /docs/mev
- Wallet Intelligence: /docs/wallets
- TypeScript SDK: /docs/sdk
- CLI Tool: /docs/cli
- REST API Reference: /docs/api

## API Summary
Base URL: https://api.probe.sh/api/v1
Auth: X-API-Key header required.

### Core Endpoints
- GET /programs: List registered programs.
- POST /programs: Register a new program.
- GET /analytics/program/:id: Fetch historical metrics.
- GET /transactions/program/:id: Fetch recent transactions.

## SDK Summary
NPM: @probe-sh/sdk
Usage: 
import { ProbeClient } from '@probe-sh/sdk';
const probe = new ProbeClient({ apiKey: '...' });

## CLI Summary
NPM: @probe-sh/cli
Login: probe auth login
Watch: probe transactions watch [PROGRAM_ID]
Deploy: probe deploy --program-path [PATH]
